---
title: 'catalog remove'
aliases:
  - /api_reference/cli/catalog/rm.html
---

Remove one or more entries from the catalog by name.

## Usage

```bash
xorq catalog remove <names...> [OPTIONS]
```

## Arguments

- **`names`** — One or more entry names to remove. Use [`catalog list`](list.qmd)
  to see available names.

## Options

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--sync` / `--no-sync` | `--sync` | Push the catalog to its remote(s) after removing. |

## Examples

Remove a single entry:
```bash
xorq catalog remove f02d28198715
```

Remove multiple entries in a single commit:
```bash
xorq catalog remove f02d28198715 c5a981ab43cd
```

Remove without syncing to remote:
```bash
xorq catalog remove f02d28198715 --no-sync
```

## See also

- [`catalog remove-alias`](remove-alias.qmd) — remove an alias without removing the underlying entry
- [`catalog list`](list.qmd) — list catalog entries
